texto: Ladies should also remember that gentlemen look more to the effect of a dress in setting off the figure and countenance of a lady than to its cost. Very few gentlemen have any idea the value of ladies' dresses. This is a subject for female criticism. Beauty of person and elegance of manners in women will always command more admiration from the opposite sex than beauty, elegance or costliness of clothing."The Scholars' Companion and Ball Room Vade MecumThomas Hillgrove, 1857
explicacao: Orientação direta de Thomas Hillgrove sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Ladies should also remember that gentlemen look more to the effect of a dress in setting off the …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, dance, dress, útil em momentos de dress e fashion.
